name: Texas Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour, margarine, and pecans by hand or on low speed with the mixture.
2. Spread the mixture in a 13x9x2-inch pan. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
3. Allow to cool completely.
4. Cream the cream cheese. Add confectioners' sugar and mix well.
5. Mix 8-oz. whipped topping with cream cheese mixture. Evenly spread half of the cream cheese mixture on the baked crust.
6. Mix pudding and milk. Spread over the cheese layer.
7. Spread remaining cheese mixture on top of pudding.
8. Top with remaining whipped topping.
9. Garnish with pecans.
